name: feature-forge-adapter-src-pi
description: Pi's hand-written adapter source. Not published; scripts/build-adapters.py reads ask-user-question/ and emits it into adapters/pi/extensions/. ask-user-question/ is a VENDORED third-party snapshot — see UPSTREAM.md before editing it. The 'verify' script is the contract scripts/validate.sh invokes for every adapter-src/<agent>/ dir.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test
